name: python3-hupper
title: python3-hupper
summary: Integrated process monitor for developing servers. (Python 3)
description:
Integrated process monitor for developing servers. (Python 3)
hupper is an integrated process monitor that will track changes to any
imported Python files in sys.modules as well as custom paths. When files
are changed the process is restarted.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use hupper3 because Integrated process monitor for developing servers. (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use hupper3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `hupper3 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for hupper3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair hupper3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `hupper3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
